programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha and Mane confront Dania when they see her throwing their things into the water. The seafood arrives to cure their hangover, and a trip to a bar turns into a party at home. Mane annoys Dania, sparking a new confrontation between them.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: A new member arrives at the house. The boss announces that they need to work to be part of the carnival. The team insists that Jey should take Nacha to bed, and a bar becomes the scene for the family's meetings and misunderstandings.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Tadeo receives a surprise, and the Shores are moved by his reaction. The celebration for Xavier’s birthday kicks off. Chile and Jey face some issues with erections, and Jawy challenges Chile to a boxing match.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The wait is over, and Jey finally delivers for Nacha. Celia sends a group to work at the aquarium. Xavier's celebration continues, and the girls sneak out of the club, leading to a fight between Mane and Jawy.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jawy and Mane's tension continues. Xavi decides to invite Pepe to stay at the house. The Shores start to doubt Fernanda. Karime seeks out the notary to validate her virginity, and Mane and Fernanda end up in a heated confrontation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane and Fernanda get into a physical fight. The conclave decides to give Fernanda an exam to prevent her expulsion. A soccer match between the Shores and the Big Hippos will determine the future of the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The exam concludes, and Fernanda stays in the house. Chile overhears the rejected girls’ plan and exposes them. A dance instructor puts Mane and Karime in their place. A brawl erupts at a restaurant.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: After confronting Mane, Dania makes an important decision. The Shores attend a band class where the "Verga Muerta" corrido is officially born. Jawy talks to Fernanda, and Mane is determined to leave Dania alone in the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier and Pepe face off once again. A group of witches arrives at the house, and not everyone is pleased with their predictions. During the girls' night, Dania apologizes to Mane, and her reaction leaves several people speechless.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores wonder about Dania's whereabouts. Chile and Diana go on a romantic date. Karime and Mane end up in the hospital. Pepe and Ramiro receive a call that changes their plans, while the Shores prepare for the carnival.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores arrive at the carnival. Karime and Potro share a very intimate moment. A hypnotist comes to the house. Nacha has suspicions and decides to take a pregnancy test, while a new member joins the vacation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane and Karime perform a binding ritual on their loves, and Nacha explodes at Jey. Potro catches Isa kissing Chile and gets upset. Mane finds out that Potro is talking bad about Jawy and decides to take action.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The tension between Jawy and Potro continues to rise. The newcomers go topless on the zip line. Nacha confronts Isa, while Jawy decides that the beach is the perfect place to sort things out with Potro.

programme.desc: Exploring whether the President attempted to disclose information on UFO abductions and close encounters in an unorthodox way.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen provides foolproof recipes for two classic pasta sauces: puttanesca and Bolognese.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta with garlic and oil is perhaps the most famous quick pasta dish. It starts with ingredients on hand—garlic, good olive oil, hot red pepper flakes—and turns them into something special and uncommonly good.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We uncover the secrets to beef Burgundy at its best—and also show you a way to make portions of it ahead of time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On a hot summer's day, life doesn't get much better than a big, juicy, smoky slab of spicy, mouth-watering ribs. Our goal was to produce flavorful, juicy, tender ribs that would be well worth the time, money, and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ham dinner—with green bean casserole—is classic American fare. But which kind of ham should you buy? And can you really make a "good" green bean casserole? We show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's the best way to enjoy summer tomatoes? While it's hard to argue with sliced, salted tomatoes, there are times when you want to use tomatoes in more elaborate dishes, and gazpacho and a cheesy tart are two of our favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Chili is probably America's favorite one-pot supper and we wanted to create a great, simple version. And while no one thinks of a clambake as a one-pot wonder, we set out to make an indoor version simple enough to prepare even on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we figure out the best recipes for two New Orleans favorites—Jambalaya and bananas Foster.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tomatoes and pasta are a classic (and delicious) pairing, but sometimes you want a change. Vegetable sauces, like the two featured in this episode—one with mushrooms and one with broccoli rabe—are appealing options.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork producers have worked so hard to remove fat from their pigs that most pork roasts have little character. Glazing a pork roast with maple syrup is an attractive way to boost flavor and we wanted to perfect this recipe.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Truckers often know where to find the best home-style cooking. And what could be better than chicken-fried steak with cream gravy and real coconut cream pie?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although chicken dinners are quick to prepare, they can go terribly wrong. Part of the problem is the chicken itself—the breast meat has little fat and becomes dry and chalky if overcooked. The other major source of trouble is improper cooking methods.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: French country cooking has a way with chicken in a pot, whether it's the famous chicken with 40 cloves of garlic or the lesser-known chicken Provençal. These dishes take chicken to new heights—or go awry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Purchase a good steak and cook it properly, and all it needs is salt and pepper—and, of course, a side of spuds. We wanted potatoes with perfect texture and big flavor—something unusual to accompany a great steak and a good bottle of wine.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Restaurant steak tips are often tough and weirdly seasoned, and thick steak fries can be pale and soggy. The test kitchen felt confident that we could rescue these dishes and turn them into something you would welcome into your home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing favorite French dishes such as cassoulet or tarte Tatin calls for a lot of patience and time. We wondered if we could find ways to simplify these recipes without sacrificing the qualities that make them classics.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Few recipes deliver so much pleasure for so little work as pancakes. The batter comes together in minutes, and the cooking time is brief. Why, then, do most Americans never make pancakes from scratch?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although easy to prepare, most cookie recipes are notoriously fickle. A minor ingredient change or fluctuation in oven temperature can yield unexpected results. Our goal was simple: Take two favorite cookies and develop reliable recipes that taste great.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We especially like to use summer berries in a no-bake pie. We wanted a no-bake pie that was every bit as appealing as a traditional double-crust pie—without all of the work.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen decided to tackle two popular sheet cakes—carrot and chocolate—and produce simple recipes that would deliver superior results.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although some would never dare to adulterate plain cheesecake, variations abound—some good, some bad, some ugly. We wanted our cheesecake to be both light and creamy, with great lemon flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When entertaining, we like desserts that look more complicated to prepare than they really are. A chocolate mousse cake or chilled lemon soufflé requires basic ingredients but is sure to elicit the proper oohs and aahs from guests.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: As the oldest prison in California, San Quentin is steeped in a violent history, so it has a set of regulations and procedures to maintain order; inmates often operate under a different code of conduct; gangs control "prison politics."

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Boredom reigns supreme for prisoners who spend endless hours, days and months confined to their cells; some have devised creative ways to pass the time; one inmate is creating a wall mural, but not with real art supplies.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: San Quentin's warden says that other than an inmate's release date, visits are the most important things in their lives; for some, visits are rare moments of intimacy; for others, they are business transaction opportunities.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside San Quentin, gangs, drugs and sheer boredom make up a violent mix; Scanvinski Hymes has been in prison since he was 18 years old; almost 20 years later, he's racked up the highest number of violent offenses in California prison history.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: San Quentin has one of the longest histories of violence; whether it's an inmate fresh off the street, a gang dropout in protective custody, or an officer trying to maintain order, they've all fallen victim to violent attacks.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At San Quentin, every inmate is marked with a security level based on his crime and prison behavior; serving as a reception center, the overpopulated prison must house a dangerous mix of levels within close proximity of one another.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Pendleton Juvenile is the last stop in Indiana for young offenders who have committed serious crimes; the staff there must always be prepared for the unexpected, and is determined to rehabilitate impulsive teens who are often angry and violent.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A maximum-security prison is responsible for educating and rehabilitating teenage gang members, sex offenders and juveniles with mental health issues; inside the razor wire fences, anything can happen, and some days are more chaotic than others.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In prison WTF stands for workouts, tattoos and food.

programme.desc: As the oldest prison in California, San Quentin is steeped in a violent history, so it has a set of regulations and procedures to maintain order; inmates often operate under a different code of conduct; gangs control "prison politics."

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Steven Moore and Angus Ashworth browse the emporiums of northeast England, parting with their big budget. But who will be victorious at the deciding auction in Dundee?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper sightsee around Northern Ireland in an old VW Beetle, on the lookout for an antique bargain. David visits the oldest distillery in the world, and Louise heads to the coast to sample some seaweed.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper continue their adventures in Northern Ireland. David gets a shock when he gets his hands on a Victorian cure-all, while Louise finds an ally while shopping.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper hit the shops in the northwest of England in their classic VW Beetle, keeping an eye out for items of interest, including some KGB spy equipment.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper are in Wales, where Louise hopes to be sitting pretty with her collection of chairs, and David tries to step out of his comfort zone.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper begin their last day on the moors of West Yorkshire. Louise gets her hands on a very early labor-saving device, and David takes a shine to some theatre seats, but how many he can afford?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp splurges on an expensive French sunburst clock, and a Victorian scent bottle has her swooning. But former soldier Raj Bisram finds ammunition boxes and a steel helmet a lot more attractive.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Raj Bisram continue their rally through East Anglia in the 1960s Sunbeam Rapier. Raj does a spot of 'step dancing' in a local pub, while Natasha buys a jukebox from the 1800s.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Kent, Raj Bisram nabs a post-Napoleonic French eagle, but cherubs and art deco costume jewelry are more Natasha Raskin Sharp's style. Which of them will clean up at the Colchester sale?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Raj Bisram stops off at one of Britain's first nature reserves, and Natasha Raskin Sharp falls for a kitten, an owl, and takes a punt on a pair of polo horses.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: For their last auction in Cambridge, there's a seventies theme going on as Raj Bisram weighs in with a large set of standing scales and Natasha Raskin Sharp shells out for a lazy Susan.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A brand new Road Trip pairing in a 1960's classic car. Auctioneer Natasha Raskin Sharp and dealer Margie Cooper do the west of Scotland. Expect treasure hunting and curry eating.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Margie Cooper and Natasha Raskin Sharp hit the antique shops of Scotland to uncover an unusual pyjama case and a rare piece of Victoriana. Both hoping for big profits at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Margie Cooper and Natasha Raskin Sharp are antiquing in the Lake District. The battle is on for victory in the third auction, but who will come out on top?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques featured in this programme from Llanelli in Wales include two Minton Majolica urns left by an impoverished naval captain, a brass monocular microscope, and an old collection of comics.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the historic Lincolnshire town Grantham (birthplace of Margaret Thatcher), finds include two letters from CS Lewis, a valuable opal necklace, and a selection of Edwardian silk stockings.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: More famous for its TT races than its antiques, the Isle of Man nevertheless yields some interesting discoveries, including a rare enamel bowl used as an ashtray and a battered motorbike.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the grounds of Castle Ashby, home of the Duke of Northampton, Hugh Scully and the experts sort through more treasures brought along by eager fans.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In a return visit to Castle Ashby in Northamptonshire, Hugh Scully looks at some of the treasures of the house and introduces previously unseen items from other Roadshows, including a Cypriot vase that is 3,000 years old.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A book of Greyhound prints kept under a bed, early Worcester porcelain found at a car-boot sale, and a black iron umbrella stand are among the superb collection of antiques brought along by the enthusiastic public of this fine old town in North Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An old painting uncovered from behind layer upon layer of wallpaper and a watering can with holes in it are the surprising items that greet Hugh Scully and the experts when they visit Clacton-on-Sea, Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A piece of Georgian furniture, a mahogany table with a secret drawer, and early lithographs of Halifax are among the finds on Hugh Scully's visit to the West Yorkshire town.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A wood-and-plaster model of a butcher's shop with an adjoining slaughterhouse, a painting of a World War I nurse, and a pair of Elizabethan scenes delight Hugh Scully and the experts when they travel to Reading, Berkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and the team visit Coleraine in Northern Ireland where they examine a valuable portrait belonging to a local cathedral, astonishing 18th-century calligraphy by a man born with no limbs, and a sundial found in a hedge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the Lake District town of Keswick in Cumbria, finds include a 17th-century bleeding bowl that is now used to hold a potted plant, a bronze statue of four cowboys, and a set of six Merrymen Delftware plates kept in a biscuit tin.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully visits the Bowes Museum in County Durham to present unseen sequences from earlier editions. Featuring photos of celebrities of the 1950s and 60s, a gold badge from an order of chivalry, and an illuminated manuscript.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The first of two shows from the gardens of Penshurst Place, Kent, where finds include a valuable Scottish impressionist painting, a pair of fine candelabra, and a "book of friendship" containing a possible Jane Austen portrait.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The second of two shows from the gardens of Penshurst Place, Kent, where finds include a tin-plate toy boat, a rare paper toy and a pair of cufflinks by a famous French maker. This is also the last Antiques Roadshow featuring Hugh Scully

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que un ex oficial espera a Frank en un restaurante, se siente culpable por las circunstancias que rodearon el despido y trata de reintegrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una chica de 18 años escapa de una casa suburbana donde estuvo cautiva por años con otras dos mujeres, el UAC busca al sospechoso que las secuestró.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC lleva a cabo una búsqueda en Los Ángeles después de que el equipo descubre imágenes de seguridad que muestran a un sospechoso siendo invitado a las casas de las víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Los planes de vacaciones del equipo se suspenden cuando la investigación del asesinato de un veterano de la Marina incluye el descubrimiento de un bebé recién nacido que no tiene identificación ni vínculos aparentes con una familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El Secretario de Defensa de los Estados Unidos, Wynn Crawford, cierra la investigación de asesinato de Gibbs y exige que los agentes especiales McGee y Torres sean arrestados por sus acciones en el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un viejo amigo de la familia, el Cabo del Ejército John Sydney, suplica a Gibbs que se una a él en un viaje por carretera para buscar un brazalete de I.D. militar desaparecido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que un niño de 9 años desnutrido y confundido se encuentra escondido en una unidad de almacenamiento, el NCIS reabre un caso de personas desaparecidas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Es Reagan contra Reagan cuando Danny va en contra de la orden directa de Jamie durante una negociación de rehenes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Mientras estaba fuera de servicio, Danny se encuentra con un robo en una gasolinera y se ve obligado a usar su arma, dejándolo conmovido y su familia y compañeros de trabajo preocupados.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es asesinada en su apartamento, Danny y Báez recurren a su hija, Margo, para pedir ayuda, pero en cambio ella complica la investigación.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/26/15. Anthony Bourdain returns to Korea after 10 years to experience hyper-modern Seoul, and taste Korean fried chicken, vintage army stew and Kimchi.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/03/15. Anthony Bourdain gets a taste of Miami with cow foot soup in Little Haiti and a personal lesson on sights and sounds from musician Questlove.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/10/15. Anthony Bourdain visits one of his favorite cities in Europe — Glasgow— where he makes his first stop at the Old College Bar for a pint.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/17/15. Anthony Bourdain explores the island nation of Madagascar, where he visits the capital city of Tana and samples Malagasy cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/31/15. Anthony Bourdain travels to his childhood home state with his brother Chris, where they rekindle memories at the classic roadside joint, Hiram’s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/07/15. Bourdain explores the beauty, culture, and food of Budapest, where he samples goulash, fisherman's soup, blood sausage, and chicken liver.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/14/15. There’s another side to Hawaii that many tourists don’t know about. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores the unknown area.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/21/15. Anthony Bourdain travels to Beirut, where he discovers a beautiful country known for its vibrant nightlife and legendary cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/25/2015. Anthony Bourdain visits Addis Ababa, to sample dishes like injera bread and soak up Ethiopian melodies with chef Marcus Samuelsson.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/01/2015. Anthony Bourdain returns to Borneo after 10 years to enjoy chicken rendang and pork noodles in the street food paradise of Kuala Lumpur.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/08/2015. Anthony Bourdain explores the mixing of food, culture and politics in Istanbul, as he enjoys an authentic Turkish breakfast and watches an oil wrestling match.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disoriented suspect would rather take a shower than comply with officers, a stolen vehicle sting nets a surprisingly young driver, and a traffic stop leads to a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police try to settle a dispute between roommates, a jilted man causes a disturbance at a public park twice in one day, and an erratic driver proves to be surprisingly sober.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Tinted car windows draw suspicion from a roaming patrol, a concerned friend gets a punch in the nose, and a traffic stop leads police a meth pipe in an odd place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues an unruly bicyclist, a man ducks into a drive-through in an attempt to elude police, and a deputy pulls over a stolen vehicle driven by a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arrested on warrants just wants his wife, a vagrant is caught on camera stealing from a liquor store, and officers check on a woman asleep on the side of the road.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the class clown at the local high school is found murdered, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called in to investigate an abandoned, blood-splattered apartment and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red-handed, burying the victims, while Catherine and Warrick take on the case of a woman found dead in a hotel spa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the apparent violent death of a woman found in a sandbox. Their investigation leads them to the underground world of s and m clubs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is in charge for the first time as the team investigates the murder of the con artist, who has run off with some tourists' money only to get shot and killed in the parking lot. The prime suspect in the case turns out to be Captain Brass' daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in when a famous real estate entrepreneur is found dead in a hotel elevator.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara are called to the crime scene when two murder victims are found hidden in pipes at a construction site in the middle of an alfalfa field, while Catherine and Nick investigate an ostensible hunting accident.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom's nemesis, serial killer Paul Millander, reappears and claims a third victim in this gripping episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is ordered by a kidnapper to accompany a man who is to deliver $1 million in ransom to him or else he will kill the man's mistress.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murder of a Las Vegas photographer whose remains were dumped at a nearby body farm.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine and Sara are called in to investigate when a hockey player dies during a practice. Warrick and Nick look into the apparent drug-related death of a sax player at a casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un agente del FBI que trabajaba encubierto es encontrado brutalmente asesinado, se llama al equipo de CSI para ayudar al compañero de la víctima a encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Nick son llamados para investigar un asesinato en un restaurante de comida rápida y tienen una gran tarea por delante cuando descubren que gran parte de la evidencia está cubierta con aceite de cocina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Langston testifica en el juicio de un respetado congresista, nuevas pruebas envían al equipo de CSI de vuelta al laboratorio para reabrir la investigación.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo acude a tres escenarios de diferentes crímenes en una misma noche. Aparentemente, no están relacionados, pero las pruebas forenses de cada caso revela un vínculo común.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el CSI va a la escena del crimen en un motel familiar, Nick comienza a relacionar tres asesinatos que se han cometido allí ese año.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Riley son tomados como rehenes después de un tiroteo en una comunidad normalmente tranquila de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un antiguo alumno de Ray es asesinado. La investigación les llevará hasta el mundo de la lucha libre mexicana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de Nick sobre un paracaidista herido dará un giro cuando Catherine descubra que está relacionado con un caso de doble asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy se encuentran en una convención de ciencia ficción de uno de sus programas de televisión favoritos, terminan investigando el asesinato de uno de sus queridos actores.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisa uno de los primeros casos en los que trabajó como CSI cuando el delincuente condenado por el asesinato afirma que el veredicto se basó en pruebas defectuosas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una enfermedad inexplicable que afecta a ciudadanos al azar de Las Vegas desconcierta a los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato por parte de una banda de motociclistas tiene lugar en un bar de motocicletas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un botín de fichas perdidas de un casino cerrado aparece en Las Vegas y le sigue una serie de asesinatos, lo que lleva a Langston a usar la fuerza letal por primera vez en su carrera como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Sara regresa inesperadamente, el equipo de CSI se une para investigar la muerte de una famosa joven actriz fallecida en un dudoso accidente de tránsito.

programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder in Miami's hippest fashion boutique, Horatio discovers that Julia's instability has turned her into a ticking bomb.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 200-foot crane crashes into a Miami high rise, putting Calleigh and Delko in jeopardy and killing Horatio’s hope of catching a renowned crime boss.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man is found handcuffed and stabbed in his hotel room, while a prank at the lab causes a rift in the CSI team and threatens their investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murderer kidnaps an innocent baby, Horatio and the CSI team must find him before the child becomes his next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a savage killer runs rampant in Miami, Horatio must intervene to stop a member of the police force from getting too close to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a shooter targets the motel where Delko is staying, Horatio and the CSI team must look into Delko's past to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team, with the help of local tipsters, fights to save a neighborhood on the brink of being taken over by a violent street gang.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSIs use radical technology to unlock the secret of a man's mind when he shows up covered in blood with no memory of where he's been.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murder occurs during a horse race, Horatio and the CSI team discover that Ryan has a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Calleigh is in a coma after a smoke inhalation injury sustained while investigating a case involving a dead doctor, drug dealers, and black market organ transplants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs make a shocking discovery about their murder victim, while Horatio tries to save his son from Julia's erratic behavior.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a flight attendant is murdered en route, Horatio Caine and the CSI team uncover all the dirty secrets of airplane travel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A home invasion becomes much more when Horatio Caine and the CSI team find out they're being targeted by the Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an innocent boy's life is in danger, Ryan is eventually forced to betray Horatio Caine and the rest of the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un robo/homicidio deja a dos hombres muertos y a un tercero aún con vida, Horacio está decidido a averiguar qué sucedió realmente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un gasista se ve envuelto en llamas invisibles y muere. Todo esto sucede durante una carrera clasificatoria del Gran Premio de las Américas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finalmente cierra el caso del asesinato de su hermano. Se reencuentra con Suzie, una ex-drogadicta que estuvo involucrada con su hermano.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio llega rápidamente al lugar cuando asaltan a un camión blindado que transporta 3.2 millones de dólares en un atrevido atraco en el centro de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin se convierte literalmente en parte de la escena de un crimen después de robar un guante de látex para agregarlo a su colección forense personal.

programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.desc: Stella and Danny investigate why a young, beautiful, and blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop. Did cuddle parties have anything to do with it?

programme.desc: A man found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys of Mott Street to the power players of Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Lindsay discover why a young dancer with a winning lottery ticket in her pocket was thrown from the Roosevelt Bridge Island Tram.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The witness to a brutal elevator slaying has disappeared, and as the CSIs track her down they uncover the world of Manhattan “Lolitas.”

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando incriminan a Hawkes por dispararle a un camarero y luego lo envían a prisión, el equipo sale a la calle para liberar a su investigador.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac y Stella trabajan con una familia sorda para encontrar al asesino de su hija. El equipo investiga el asesinato de una joven sensación del patinaje.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando un rico agente inmobiliario es encontrado muerto en una casa, Mac y Stella trabajan con pruebas que sugieren que él fue secuestrador o secuestrado.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Danny y Mac encuentran un cadáver en un camión de sal que luego identifican como un ejecutivo de deportes extremos de alto poder.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un estudiante universitario en un laberinto del museo de la granja del condado de Queens, el equipo de CSI descubre una fraternidad parecida a un culto con severos castigos.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac investiga la muerte de una niña encontrada en una bañera llena de pétalos de rosa. Stella cuestiona la muerte de un hombre que cayó en su pecera.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac y Danny investigan un caso en el que encontraron muerto a un ex convicto delirante acostado sobre una cama de dinero en su casa.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo investiga un caso en el que ocurren asesinatos inspirados en trucos de magia, incluido el de una mujer cortada por la mitad mientras estaba en una caja de madera.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Danny y Lindsay encuentran al popular chef Alec Green muerto en la bodega de su restaurante de moda con un sacacorchos colgando del pecho.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un caballero de brillante armadura empalado con una lanza en Central Park y un empresario apuñalado con un picahielos en un hotel cercano comparten una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Anulan la sentencia contra un asesino en serie cuando Mac encarcela al oficial que lo arrestó, pero aparece una víctima con la firma del asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Stella se ve obligada a enfrentar recuerdos dolorosos cuando el detective Valens la visita y le dice que su ADN está conectado a un caso sin resolver de Filadelfia, lo que la convierte en sospechosa.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI queda desconcertado cuando las pruebas y los testigos señalan a John McEnroe como su sospechoso de asesinato a pesar de su coartada irrefutable.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac, Stella y Hawkes se ven obligados a salvar el laboratorio cuando un capo de la droga y su pandilla bajan a la bóveda del equipo de CSI para recuperar su mercancía.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Héctor tuvo un hijo con Naomi pero fue preso y nunca tuvo contacto con él. También, Julio hace fiestas sexuales donde uno de los participantes tiene VIH y nadie sabe quién es.

programme.desc: Rosa descubre a su hija desnuda teniendo sexo virtual con un chico. Además, Jorge nació en EE.UU., pero su mamá tuvo otro hijo en México, a quien trajo con sus documentos.

programme.desc: Sandra exige indemnización por daños causados a su hija Isabela por un compañero de escuela. La madre de Alondra tiene alzhéimer, su padre la envió a una clí­nica y trajo a casa a su amante.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Raúl recibió en un trasplante el corazón del hijo de Elizabeth, ahora ella cree ser familia. Por otro lado, Omaira quiere adoptar a un niño de supuestamente 8 años, pero hay algo oculto.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Duplex

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Jacuzzi al pasado
programme.desc: ¡Prepárese a olvidar el pasado con la versión inapropiada más salvaje del jacuzzi al pasado! Las risas comienzan cuando cuatro amigos comparten una noche en un jacuzzi en un resort de esquí, y se despiertan con una fuerte resaca en 1986.

programme.title: El principe de las mujeres
programme.desc: Marcus Graham, un ejecutivo publicitario, es el soltero por antonomasia y siempre lleva a una mujer nueva del brazo. Cuando aparece en escena Jacqueline, su nueva jefa, Marcus recibe por primera vez su propia medicina.

programme.desc: Gene Autry's investigation of the murder of his partner, leads him to Mexico, where he becomes involved with the beautiful singer whose father has also been killed, and finds a jewelry smuggling ring.

programme.title: Valley Of Fire
programme.desc: Gene Autry is the new mayor of a lawless town. He has to rid the town of its gambling king and to import a group of gals to settle the men. Gene must out-gun renegades who want to kidnap the gals.

programme.title: The Kentuckian
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.desc: When a revered Apache chief is brutally murdered en route to Fort Yuma to negotiate a peace treaty, all-out war erupts in this rousing -- and surprisingly touching -- western starring Peter Graves and directed by the legendary Lesley Selander.

programme.title: Pork Chop Hill
programme.desc: Gregory Peck heads an all-star cast in this true re-enactment of the terrifying Korean War that brilliantly pulls the viewer inextricably into the crossfire that surrounds American foot soldiers.

programme.title: My Favorite Martian
programme.desc: Martin loses his powers when he gets sick, a condition that Martians are not familiar with.

programme.title: My Favorite Martian
programme.desc: Martin finds out about the US space strategy and tries to warn the government they are doomed.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido apuñalada más de treinta veces y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. Cerca de su cabeza, la policía descubrió un distintivo botón con hebras de hilo todavía unidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, se descubrió el cuerpo de una mujer joven en un río de Ohio. La mayor parte de la evidencia había sido borrada, pero el hijo de 6 años de la víctima, sin saberlo, les dijo a los investigadores todo lo que necesitaban saber.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se llama a la policía de las Grandes Llanuras por un cadáver, una verificación de antecedentes de la víctima los lleva a una extraña red de vagabundos sin hogar, subastas de ganado y cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una mujer joven fue descubierto en una granja aislada cerca de Delano, California. Ella no tenía identificación, pero la policía encontró las llaves de un buzón de correo en los bolsillos de sus pantalones.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un rastro de un asesinato se esfuma, hasta que la policía recibe un llamado de una mujer cuyo esposo, Gerald Powers, tenía un pasado criminal y una afición por los Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, el cuerpo de la joven madre, Summer Baldwin, fue encontrado en una maleta en un vertedero de Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres fueron asesinados mientras dormían en sus camas. La noche siguiente, un incendio provocó la destrucción de una clínica de planificación familiar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se denuncia la desaparición de una mujer tras una pelea con su marido. La policía sospecha de un hombre que denunció un incendio en su automóvil. En el interior se encuentran dos diminutas gotas de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario
programme.desc: La policía es enviada a la escena de un tiroteo y descubren que el esposo de la víctima es uno de los suyos: un detective de homicidios que dice que su esposa se disparó accidentalmente en la cabeza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la respuesta de emergencia de Illinois atendió un incendio en un garaje y se encontró a un hombre aplastado debajo de un camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos

programme.desc: An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar visits Tijuana, Mexico, to team up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals, an organization that rescues dogs and finds them U.S. homes; a cocker spaniel taunts her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier Kind Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore peace at an apartment complex where the residents' dogs do not get along; a family has trouble controlling its three dogs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: This week, Peter gets a scare when he tries to help a horse with some worrying cancerous growths. Julian meets a five-month-old cockapoo with a badly broken leg. Matt operates on a cow's tail and Shona enters a showjumping competition.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Highlighting the tireless efforts of Jessica Nicodemo, an animal rescue expert specializing in saving at-risk animals from natural disasters and transporting them to safe homes.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian dashes to an emergency - Vet Matt needs an experienced pair of hands. A young heifer, Bonnie, is struggling to give birth naturally. Peter sees old pal Benji the bouncy border terrier who has been vomiting and is in grave danger.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Bulldog helps sweep backyard, English bulldog plays with a broom while the owner tries to sleep; baby cockatiel hangs onto toy bell, funny dance; cat plays with a toy school bus.

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs
programme.desc: GINNY: THE DOG WHO RESCUES CATS (New York City) Ginny has a thing for cats, especially cats in need of help. Every night, Ginny and her owner rescue injured or abandoned cats in New York City.

programme.title: Dogs 24/7
programme.desc: From cute viral videos to pup training tips, the dogs on this channel just don't stop. Catch the best dogs around, right here, 24/7.

programme.title: Breeder of the Pack
programme.desc: Dressed in camouflage, toting a rifle, surrounded by her champion Nova Scotia Duck Tollers, Sue Kish is not your typical breeder. She has a mission…one she believes most dog breeders have forsaken.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: In a state that holds one of the Seven Natural Wonders of the World, it's no wonder Arizona is also home to some of the nation's cutest puppies! Contestants will vie for the title of Phoenix's cutest puppy including a pooch born without front paws!

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Inspector Anthony Joynes arranges a warrant to rescue four dogs from a dangerously overcrowded house.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: The largest abscess Julian’s ever seen is on a bull’s backside - a waterfall of pus is coming! Peter meets Thor the giant rabbit as well as North Yorkshire’s best-dressed dog. And, just a few hours old, a lamb is rushed into surgery.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Crawford's are searching for a brand new puppy to become their next family member. Mom and dad are going to have to help their kids control the excitement as they visit an English Mastiff, An English Bulldog and a Doberman Pinscher.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Friend or Foe

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: Animal Attractions

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A scandalous newspaper headline implicates Congressman McVane with a young girl in Washington; he realizes Alexis orchestrated his downfall. Kirby finds she is pregnant.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.

programme.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
